title: 1Password Event
description: Represents event data from the 1Password Events API, including sign-in attempts, item usage records, and audit events used for security monitoring and compliance.

SignInAttempt.description: A record of a sign-in attempt to a 1Password account.

uuid.description: The unique identifier for the sign-in attempt.

session_uuid.description: The UUID of the session associated with the sign-in attempt.

timestamp.description: When the sign-in attempt occurred in ISO 8601 format.

category.description: The overall result category of the sign-in attempt.

type.description: The specific type of sign-in result.

country.description: The two-letter ISO country code of the sign-in location.

ItemUsage.description: A record of an item being accessed, modified, or used in a shared vault.

uuid.description: The unique identifier for the item usage record.

timestamp.description: When the item was accessed in ISO 8601 format.

used_version.description: The version of the item that was used.

vault_uuid.description: The UUID of the vault containing the item.

item_uuid.description: The UUID of the item that was used.

action.description: The type of action performed on the item.

AuditEvent.description: A record of an action performed by a team member within the 1Password account.

uuid.description: The unique identifier for the audit event.

timestamp.description: When the action was performed in ISO 8601 format.

actor_uuid.description: The UUID of the user who performed the action.

action.description: The type of action that was performed.

object_type.description: The type of object the action was performed on.

object_uuid.description: The UUID of the object the action was performed on.

aux_id.description: An auxiliary identifier providing additional context.

aux_uuid.description: An auxiliary UUID providing additional context.

aux_info.description: Additional auxiliary information about the event.

User.description: A 1Password user involved in an event.

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

Client.description: Information about the client application used in an event.

os_name.description: The name of the operating system.

os_version.description: The version of the operating system.

ip.description: The IP address of the client.

Location.description: Geographic location information associated with an event.
